title: Skadden | Company Profile - Vault
body: From M&A to tax, Skadden is a legal powerhouse and mainstay among the most prestigious firms in Vault’s Top 100 ranking. Skadden lawyers are a social bunch who value teamwork and mentorship, while also diving headfirst into complex matters.

title: Vault 2025 Law Firm Rankings Released
body: 2 days ago · NEW YORK, June 18, 2024 /PRNewswire/ — For the ninth year running, Cravath, Swaine & Moore LLP tops the Vault 100 as the most prestigious firm in the United States. Cravath, which associates in Vault’s survey refer to as “the gold standard,” has U.S. offices in New York City and Washington, DC.

title: Vault Law Releases 2025 Rankings for Its Top 100 Law Firms ...
body: Jun 18, 2024 · The Vault 100 ranking is based on scores from more than 20,000 law firm associates surveyed earlier this year. NEW YORK, June 18, 2024 /PRNewswire/ — For the ninth year running, Cravath, Swaine & Moore LLP tops the Vault 100 as the most prestigious firm in the United States.
